user.title: Set up Bluetooth SIG Devices
user.description: This integration discovers Bluetooth devices that implement standard SIG profiles. Devices will appear for confirmation before entities are created.

integration_discovery_confirm.title: Confirm Bluetooth SIG Device

abort.bluetooth_not_available: Bluetooth is not available on this system.
abort.no_options_available: No options available for this device.

init.title: Bluetooth SIG Devices Options
init.description: Configure how often connectable devices are polled for GATT characteristic data.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to read GATT characteristics from connectable devices. Range: 30-86400 seconds.
